behaviors.reasoning: This behavior is deterministic local logic at a single function/object boundary; lower than Unit is not applicable.
This behavior validates contracts or state handoff across local modules; a pure unit test can miss cross-component wiring failures.
This behavior depends on the quality or judgment of real AI/LLM model output, which deterministic stubs cannot validate.
This behavior validates end-to-end delivery through real external systems (including actual email delivery/inbox path), which cannot be fully verified with in-process fakes.
This behavior requires system-boundary validation against runtime/environment interactions beyond in-process module wiring.
